title: Mocoosy 50Pcs Artificial Roses Flowers, Blush Pink Roses Artificial Flowers Foam Fake Roses with Stem for Wedding Bridal Bouquets Party Centerpieces Artificial Flowers Crafts DIY Home Decoration
features: SUPREME MATERIAL: All roses artificial flowers made of a soft high quality latex foam which gives them a velvety finish that makes them super realistic. No smelly, No fade, No misshapen, No spotted and the color of the flowers are vivid and uniform, look and feel like real roses.

PERFECT DIY PROJECT: Lifelike blush roses, pure and elegant. Each fake rose approaches 3.2 inches, the stem is about 8 inches long, easily cut or curl to work with. Will not appear flower leaf abscission phenomenon. Great for DIYers to make your own gorgeous flower artworks/crafts.

ENDLESS DECORATING OPTIONS: Perfect for making bouquets, centerpieces, kissing balls, boutonnieres, cake flowers or any other artificial flower arrangements that you want at wedding, birthday, baby shower, Bridal Shower, party home decor and flowers for Valentine's Day, Mother's Day. Beautiful amazing quality flowers are ideal choice for DIY flower decor.

ROMANTIC FLOWER DECOR: The foam roses stay as beautiful as the day you get them.The leaves are not attached so you can put them on the flowers depending on your wish. Make some unique and stunning bouquets with these light pink roses. Add some romantic sweet atmosphere to your event.

PACKING & GUARABTEE: Comes in a set of 50 artificial roses bulk with long stems. Pack into 2 window boxes. 8 rose leaves come in the box as complimentary. Mocoosy is committed to providing the consumer with the great value on our products. Our customer service is always ready to help.
description: Product Description Mocoosy Artificial Roses with Stem and Leaves The Artificial Rose bulk by Mocoosy has the appearance of natural flowers and provides a realistic look to your decorations of home, office, or special event. Made from soft high-quality latex foam, each faux rose in the 50-piece bundle offers a practical alternative to real flowers, look and feel just like actual roses. The soft color of the flowers easily blends with various accents and color schemes to add a natural element, also a perfect addition to the home, office or special occasions like weddings and showers. The roses are easy to bend and cut making them ideal for DIY flower decor like bouquets, boutonnieres, flower balls, centerpieces, decorative accents, cake flowers, and more! If you are a flower DIY amateur, our fake roses is unique materials for your gorgeous artworks ! Welcome to share your decoration experience picture with us ! Material: Latex Foam, Wire Dimensions: Stem 8 inches. Rose approximately 3.2 inch diameter Color: Blush Pink Package: 1 x Pack of 50pcs Artificial Roses, 1 x 8 Sets of Leaves Package Dimensions (L x W x H) : 27.5 x 25.5 x 10.5 cm About Mocoosy Mocoosy is a young and rapidly developing company operating in various party favors and home decorations. We’re committed to providing more quality, more stylish and beautiful products and quality service. Not only did we hope that our products are glowing to be a hit at your events, but also add a dose of fantasy to your daily life. With Mocoosy products,let your every day deserve to be commemorated. Blush Pink Rose for Decorations High quality & Realistic Look 100% Brand New and High Quality latex foam. Base on the real rose flower to produce. No smelly, No fade, No misshapen, No spotted and the color of the flowers are vivid and uniform, look and feel like real roses Easy Creations Each rose has it's own stem made by metal wire, flexible and not easy to break off, wrapped by green paper outside, looks more natural. Can be easily bent or cut off as needed, Meets Your Various DIY ideas Colorful Arrangements Deliver real love to special someone Wedding flowers decoration Make bridal bouquet Baby breath flowers Decorate your home and party Make Your Own Style Rose You can freely to cut or curl to make your own bouquets. Make some unique and stunning bouquets with these pink roses and your imagination. Exquisite packaging Pack of 50 pcs individual artificial roses Packing by kraft box, perfect gift choice 8 rose leaves come in the box as complimentary Tips: Rose stem can be bend, snipped to fit your
